arts.ttl: Leeds v West Brom team news: Ajayi, Maja, Wallace out
arts.sum: Leeds United host West Brom this Saturday afternoon with a chance to extend their lead at the top of the Championship table, but the Baggies have major setbacks to contend with. Semi Ajayi: Major injury issue confirmed for West Brom v Leeds

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI vs West Brom as Joe Rothwell and Ilia Gruev decisions made
arts.sum: However, both will likely start against West Brom, who are currently the highest ranked team Leeds have to play in their final 12 matches. Predicted Leeds XI for WBA: Meslier; Bogle, Rodon, Struijk, Firpo; Tanaka, Rothwell; James, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe.

arts.ttl: West Brom accounts released with £34m loss but Shilen Patel's £30m investment revealed
arts.sum: This is very much the remnants of the legacy of Guochuan Lai, who finally departed the club exactly a year ago when he sold up to Shilen Patel and Bilkul for a fraction of what he paid Jeremy Peace to acquire Albion back in 2016 - that sum amounting to in excess of £200m. West Bromwich Albion have submitted their accounts to Companies House for the year ending June 2024 and have made, as predicted, a sizeable loss

arts.ttl: Ampadu, Bamford, Wober - Leeds United latest injury news and possible return dates - Leeds Live
arts.sum: The Whites boss has underlined his disgruntlement at Leeds having to play three games in seven days before the international break and does not want to speak too much about his club’s top two status until the other side of the March international break. Leeds United are seven points clear of the play-offs with 12 games to play but Daniel Farke has insisted the race for promotion is far from over.

arts.ttl: ‘Comfortable’ – Leeds United prediction made by EFL pundit ahead of West Brom clash
arts.sum: Leeds United have been backed to record a ‘comfortable’ home win over West Brom this weekend by EFL… The post ‘Comfortable’ – Leeds United prediction made by EFL pundit ahead of West Brom clash appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: “It’s true” – Player reveals snubbing Leeds United for ‘very big club’ in January
arts.sum: Leeds United were one of the clubs to have missed out on signing Daniel Svensson in the winter market. He completed a loan move to Borussia Dortmund from FC Nordsjælland on deadline day. Last November, we covered claims from Sweden that the Whites were keen on securing his services. arts.ttl: Leeds United boast brilliant Championship record that nobody is talking about
arts.sum: But all have tallied more yellow cards than Leeds this campaign and so it means United sit bottom of the Championship discipline chart. Farke himself may have served a touchline ban against Sheffield United for three yellow cards in the dugout but none of his players have been sent off at all.

arts.ttl: Leeds: Max Wöber expected to leave in summer
arts.sum: Leeds United have their sights firmly fixed on promotion, but that outcome might not matter for Max Wöber, who is claimed to be leaving in the summer. Wöber may think to himself why he comes in for more stick from the Leeds fanbase than Brenden Aaronson, when both did the same thing last season in leaving for the Bundesliga on loan.

arts.ttl: 49ers have questions to answer for Daniel Farke ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: But there are long term questions to be answered, particularly given that Farke this month said he would prefer to have transfer plans in place sooner rather than later, to give Leeds the best chance in the summer window. Leeds United would certainly take priority over Rangers for the 49ers given the vast revenues the Premier League and English football brings.

arts.ttl: Bundesliga manager huge fan of Leeds United star; wants his club to sign him this summer
arts.sum: Leeds United loanee Rasmus Kristensen is having a fantastic season at Eintracht Frankfurt, sparking speculations about his long-term future. Kristensen joined the German club on loan last summer and has since done excelled under Dino Toppmoller. The versatile right-back has made 29 appearances across all competitions for the club, scoring 1 and assisting 2.
